items.heading: Learn in the Heart of London
items.body: Study in Regent's Park, one of London's most beautiful campuses, surrounded by global culture, business and creative industries.

items.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='40' height='40' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><line x1='2' y1='12' x2='22' y2='12'/><path d='M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z'/></svg>
items.heading: A Truly International Community
items.body: Join students from over 140 countries and build a global network that lasts a lifetime.

items.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='40' height='40' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2'/><circle cx='9' cy='7' r='4'/><path d='M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87'/><path d='M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75'/></svg>
items.heading: Small Classes, Big Impact
items.body: Benefit from an intimate learning environment where you're known by name, not number.
